content: The unresolved search gaps in comparing curiosity-driven RL methods (ICM vs RND) can themselves be framed as an intrinsic reward signal for a meta curious active learning agent that explores understudied performance differences between existing curious agent architectures. This meta-agent would prioritize filling the incomplete knowledge gaps in the current research landscape the same way a standard curious RL agent explores unvisited states in an environment.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
